## Compliance and Review Notes

- Research content changed:
- Validated notes changed:
- Assumptions introduced:
- Placeholder or candidate objects created:
- Evidence links added, removed or changed:
- Status, analysis state, evidence strength or confidence changed:
- External contributions used:
- Items split, merged, superseded or deprecated:
- LLM generated or materially shaped content:
- Object changelogs updated:
- Repository changelog updated:
- LLM intervention log required:
